command: env OMP_NUM_THREADS=1 MKL_NUM_THREADS=1 OPENBLAS_NUM_THREADS=1 NUMEXPR_NUM_THREADS=1 conda run --no-capture-output -n qwen3-asr qwen-asr-serve "${WORKSPACE_ROOT}/Qwen3-ASR-0.6B" --served-model-name qwen3-asr --gpu-memory-utilization 0.25 --max-model-len 1024 --max-num-seqs 1 --enforce-eager --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8001
